name: Rice Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat.
2. Add the onions and sauté for 5 minutes, until golden.
3. Add the celery, carrots, and pepper; sauté for 5 minutes.
4. Add the diced garlic and sauté for another 5 minutes
until the vegetables are tender.
5. Season with the tamari, garlic powder, basil, and oregano.
6. Remove from heat. Add the rice. Season to taste.
7. Add the peanut butter and flour.
8. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
9. Oil a cookie sheet.
10. Form the mixture into patties, and place on the cookie
sheet.
11. Bake for 5 to 6 minutes until crispy golden on top;
turn over and bake for 5 to 6 more minutes.
